case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. MARTINEZ, ALICIA M. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ALICIA M. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 TURK ST #T1511, LEASE FORFEITED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ALICIA M. DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ALICIA M.
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ALICIA M.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO SERVED SEP-27-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ALICIA M.
